extra.reason: Built scripts/validate-skills.mjs (node, no deps). Smoke-tested: broken-link fixture exits 1; clean fixture exits 0. Checks frontmatter, dir match, body, links, README coverage.
Authored skills/beads/SKILL.md: embedded-mode setup, work loop (ready/claim/close with evidence), dep graph, multi-session dolt sync rules, session rituals, anti-patterns. Validator passes.

Authored skills/dev-browser/SKILL.md: install, headless/connect modes, persistent named pages, 3-pass verification pattern (reach/act/evidence), screenshot evidence convention, locator+failure rules. Validator passes.

Authored skills/requirements-interview/ (SKILL.md + requirements-template): batched interview protocol, assumption ledger, testable Given/When/Then criteria, greenfield/existing mode, anti-patterns. Validator passes.

Authored skills/plan-builder/ (SKILL.md + plan-template): design decisions with rationale, vertical stories sized for one-agent handoff with per-story verification, criteria coverage matrix, beads graph registration. Validator passes.

Authored skills/factory-orchestrate/ (SKILL.md + goal-handoff-template): coordinator story loop (pick/handoff/verify/accept-or-bounce/checkpoint), codex exec xhigh dispatch example, never-on-trust verification, 3-attempt bounce with parked-story escalation, long-run durability (state in beads+docs, resume ritual, empty-queue gap analysis, evidence-based done), hard stops. Validator passes.

Authored skills/skill-feedback/ (SKILL.md + feedback-template) and skills/skill-sweep/SKILL.md: .factory/feedback.json config (jira/github placeholders, no invented credentials), outbox fallback, severity taxonomy, local-stopgap divergence rule, sweep triage (valid/dup/project-specific/idea), validate+changelog+release, close-with-evidence, cascade documented in both. Validator passes.

Authored skills/process-init/ (SKILL.md + process-template) and skills/process-revamp/SKILL.md: operating-mode table (autonomous VPS vs supervised workstation) with shared hard-stop core, ordered substrate install (wiki, beads, skills, feedback, gates, evidence, CI), docs/process.md template, prove-it-with-one-story rule; revamp adds audit table (present/partial/absent with proof paths), adapt-vs-replace mapping, staged revertible adoption, respect-existing-conventions rules. Validator passes.

Authored skills/repo-bootstrap/ (SKILL.md + wiki-templates reference): layer question (project/playbook/launcher), 3-layer wiki scaffold with stable-ID frontmatter and relative-link rules, thin AGENTS.md-canonical + CLAUDE.md-pointer entrypoints (handbook+placeholders variant for divergence), compounding loop (session rituals, closeout check, LRN ledger with candidate/promoted/rejected statuses, gardening cadence), lint rules, anti-patterns. Distilled from overclaude + VDB-Agentic-Playbook exemplar study. Validator passes all 10 skills.

Created docs/index.md (wiki catalog: start-here, process, decisions-in-log convention) and docs/log.md (provenance-format bootstrap entry with decisions + validator learning). Dogfoods repo-bootstrap templates.

Wrote README.md: install commands (npx skills add incl. eve flow), 10-skill directory in three groups with one-line glosses, how-it-fits-together narrative, stack defaults note, development section, MIT license. Validator README-coverage warning now clear.
Added .github/workflows/validate.yml: node 20, runs scripts/validate-skills.mjs on push + PR.
